name: Rum Raisin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, nuts, brown sugar and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 15 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar and 3 tablespoons flour, mixing on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream and rum; mix well.
3. Combine remaining margarine, flour and brown sugar in another bowl, cutting into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in raisins, nuts and oats.
4. Pour the crumb mixture over the cream cheese layer. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 50 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
